    Search page
    Search help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AboutDialog
     
    Aperture
    Representation of the instrument's integration window speed aperture settings, determining the balance between measurement resolution and sampling speed.
    BiasSweepDialog
     
    BiasSweepWorker
    Asynchronous worker that performs a bias voltage sweep (0-499) on a background thread and updates the UI chart in real time.
    BiasVoltage
    Representation of the internal physical DC bias voltage injection steps, used during component testing under specific operating voltage offsets.
    CapacitanceDerivator
    Utility calculator processing secondary complex electrical parameters derived from primary Capacitance (C) and Dissipation Factor (D) metrics under dynamic AC test frequencies.
    ConfigBusiness
    Controller class responsible for managing and applying hardware configuration parameters sequentially to the LCR meter device.
    ConfigDTO
    Data Transfer Object containing the hardware configuration parameters for the LCR meter.
    ConfigurationPanel
    Sidebar configuration panel containing setup controls for the LCR meter.
    Constants
    System-wide constants container managing user interface text literals, execution log flags, and structural measurement display matrix definitions.
    CSVRecordingRunnable
    Consumer thread runnable that continuously pulls measurement data from a blocking queue and records it into a CSV file.
    DerivateCapacitance
    Representation of secondary or derived complex electrical parameters computed alongside primary Capacitance (C) measurements under AC test signals.
    DerivateImpedance
    Representation of secondary or derived complex electrical parameters computed alongside primary Impedance (Z) measurements under AC test signals.
    DerivateInductance
    Representation of secondary or derived complex electrical parameters computed alongside primary Inductance (L) measurements under AC test signals.
    DerivateResistance
    Representation of secondary or derived complex electrical parameters computed alongside primary Resistance (R) measurements under AC test signals.
    DerivedPanel
    Dashboard panel that displays calculated derived parameters in a 2x3 grid using the high-contrast, dark-tech aesthetic of InfoPanel.
    DeviceInfo
    Immutable object containing identification and firmware details of the connected LCR device.
    DisplayFormatter
    Utility utility class responsible for formatting component parameter labels, converting raw instrument acronym tokens into verbose engineering strings for UI bindings.
    DisplayPage
    Representation of the different display screen pages or operational views configurable on the hardware meter front panel layout.
    ET431Exception
    Custom exception representing hardware communication errors, parsing failures, or command transmission timeout exceptions specific to the East Tester ET431 LCR meter control layer.
    ETMeter
    Implementation of the LcrMeter interface handling SCPI command communication over a serial connection for the ET431 series hardware.
    Frequency
    Representation of the instrument's operational AC test signal frequencies, including target hardware adjustments for specific instrument edge-cases.
    HiokiMeter
    Implementation of the LcrMeter interface handling SCPI command communication over a serial connection for the Hioki IM3536 / 3532 series hardware.
    ImpedanceDerivator
    Utility calculator processing secondary complex electrical parameters derived from primary Impedance (Z) magnitude and Reactance (X) metrics under dynamic AC test frequencies.
    InductanceDerivator
    Utility calculator processing secondary complex electrical parameters derived from primary Inductance (L) and Quality Factor (Q) metrics under dynamic AC test frequencies.
    InfoPanel
    Horizontal dashboard header that displays current meter configurations using the high-contrast, dark-tech aesthetic of the MeasurementPanel.
    LcrMeter
    Unified interface definition for LCR meter hardware control, exposing connectivity, raw SCPI execution, and device configuration parameters.
    Log
    Utility logging wrapper providing centralized console output redirection gated by global system tracking visibility flags.
    MainWindow
    Main application frame that orchestrates the subpanels and connects UI events to the controller.
    Measurement
    Immutable object representing a single pair of readings from the LCR meter.
    MeasurementBusiness
    Background worker thread responsible for continuously polling measurement data from the LCR meter, performing metric conversions, and executing periodic hardware configuration syncs.
    MeasurementDTO
    Data Transfer Object that encapsulates raw readings, parsed measurement values, and their derived components (resistance, capacitance, inductance, impedance).
    MeasurementObserver
    Observer interface defining the lifecycle callbacks for dispatching instrument telemetry updates, hardware configuration shifts, and connection tear-down events to listening UI presentation components.
    MeasurementPanel
    UI panel for displaying real-time primary and secondary LCR measurements.
    MeterBusiness
    Factory and coordinator class responsible for initializing, selecting, and establishing connections to different supported LCR meter hardware models.
    MeterController
    Main application controller coordinating UI user interactions from the view layer and driving async transactional updates to the underlying LCR meter hardware.
    MeterView
    View interface defining the presentation layer contract for the LCR meter instrument, handling real-time connection telemetry and operational hardware configurations.
    PrimaryParameter
    Representation of the primary electrical measurement parameters supported by the instrument, defining the core physical property under evaluation.
    Range
    Representation of the discrete manual hardware resistance range brackets utilized by the instrument's internal measurement bridge subsystems.
    RealTimeChartPanel
    Custom graphical presentation panel managing real-time dynamic dashboard feeds for live telemetry data streams using asymmetric synchronized charting layers.
    RelativeMode
    Representation of the instrument's relative measurement state mode toggle, used to zero out parasitic baseline metrics against a reference component value.
    ResistanceDerivator
    Utility calculator processing secondary complex electrical parameters derived from primary Resistance (R) and Reactance (X) metrics under dynamic AC test frequencies.
    SecondaryParameter
    Representation of the secondary electrical measurement parameters supported by the instrument, evaluating phase, dissipation, quality, or loss characteristics.
    SerialConnection
    Low-level serial communication infrastructure that wraps jSerialComm routines to handle SCPI write/read transactions securely with the hardware meter.
    SerialDetector
     
    SerialDetector.OnPortDetectedListener
     
    SeriesMode
    Representation of the instrument's equivalent circuit model configuration, selecting between serial (SER) or parallel (PAL) parameter compilation.
    StatusBarPanel
    Status bar component that provides real-time connection status and instrument metadata.
    SupportedMeter
    Representation of the different hardware instrument manufacturers and models officially supported by the application's driving communication layer layers.
    Test
     
    TonghuiMeter
    Implementation of the LcrMeter interface handling strict composite SCPI command mappings over a serial connection for Tonghui series hardware (e.g., TH2839).
    ValueFormatter
    Utility formatter engineered to convert raw scalar meter components into sanitized, scannable engineering and standard SI notation strings using custom precision scaling rules.
    Voltage
    Representation of the instrument's operational AC test signal voltage levels, tracking magnitudes in millivolts for precision hardware configuration mapping.
